channel.title: FreelanceTax Blog
channel.description: Guides, tips, and strategies for managing your self-employment taxes and keeping more of what you earn.

item.title: How to Pay Quarterly Estimated Taxes in Texas (2026 Guide)
item.description: Learn how Texas freelancers handle quarterly estimated taxes. A complete guide to federal requirements, payment methods, and common pitfalls for 2026.

item.title: Upwork vs. Fiverr Fees: Which Is Better for US Developers in 2026?
item.description: A detailed breakdown of Upwork and Fiverr platform fees, withdrawal costs, and tax implications for US-based freelance developers in 2026.

item.title: Top 7 Tax Write-Offs for Digital Marketers in 2026
item.description: Maximize your tax savings. Discover the top 7 tax deductions every freelance digital marketer should claim in 2026.

item.title: The Self-Employment Tax Explained: A 2026 Walkthrough for Freelancers
item.description: Understand the 15.3% self-employment tax, the 92.35% rule, and the Social Security cap for freelancers in the 2026 tax year.

item.title: How Much Should You Set Aside for Taxes on a $5,000 Project?
item.description: A step-by-step breakdown of exactly how much money a US freelancer should set aside for taxes from a $5,000 project.

item.title: 1099-NEC vs. 1099-K: What Freelancers Need to Know in 2026
item.description: Confused by tax forms? Learn the difference between Form 1099-NEC and Form 1099-K, and how US freelancers should handle them in 2026.

item.title: The Home Office Deduction: Simplified vs. Actual Method (2026)
item.description: Learn how to legally claim the home office deduction in 2026. Compare the simplified method versus the actual expenses method for freelancers.

item.title: Quarterly Estimated Taxes in California for Freelancers (2026)
item.description: A comprehensive guide to California estimated taxes for freelancers. Understand FTB deadlines, state tax rates, and how to stay compliant in 2026.

item.title: How to Track Business Expenses as a Freelancer Without Losing Your Mind
item.description: A simple, stress-free workflow for freelancers to track business expenses, maximize tax deductions, and survive an IRS audit.

item.title: Are Upwork Fees Tax-Deductible? Yes — Here's How to Claim Them
item.description: Learn why platform fees from Upwork, Fiverr, and Stripe are fully tax-deductible and how to correctly report them on your IRS Schedule C.

item.title: The 92.35% Rule: Why You Don't Pay SE Tax on Your Full Earnings
item.description: Discover how the IRS 92.35% rule saves freelancers money on self-employment taxes and how the math works in 2026.

item.title: Estimated Tax Safe Harbor Rules for High-Income Freelancers (2026)
item.description: Learn how high-income freelancers can use IRS safe harbor rules to avoid underpayment penalties, including the 110% rule for 2026.
